modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Sound issues on PC during Zoom meetings and voicemail playback.

full_description_text:  
I can't hear anything on my PC.  
Voicemail is silent, and my sound is all messed up.  
During Zoom calls, I can hear others, but they can't hear me.  
I even got an error saying my speaker isn't connected.
short_description: Sound issues on PC during Zoom meetings and voicemail playback.
description:
I can't hear anything on my PC.  
Voicemail is silent, and my sound is all messed up.  
During Zoom calls, I can hear others, but they can't hear me.  
I even got an error saying my speaker isn't connected.
